description: Detects function parameters using concrete infrastructure types instead of trait abstractions in Rust. Simplified from Rust: flags all exported functions as candidates for missing trait abstraction (cannot inspect parameter types in JSON DSL without match_pattern). Uses select:symbol to identify exported functions as indicators.

flag.message: Exported function detected -- verify parameters do not use concrete infrastructure types (File, TcpStream) instead of trait abstractions (impl Read, impl Write)
